Class ScanCacheService

java.lang.Object
org.tavall.couriers.api.cache.abstracts.AbstractCache<ScanCacheService, ScanResponse>
org.tavall.couriers.api.qr.scan.cache.ScanCacheService
All Implemented Interfaces:
ICacheKey<ScanCacheService>, ICacheValue<ScanResponse>
@Component public class ScanCacheService extends AbstractCache<ScanCacheService, ScanResponse>

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ScanCacheService()
    Constructs a ScanCacheService from AbstractCache with a 5-minute default TTL.
